ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., vendor, library, tool) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the package (e.g., Low, Medium, High, Highest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_vendors" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor providing the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the confidence level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* End of life date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
